hooks.command: jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // \"\"" | { read -r f; case "$f" in */prompts/*) printf "%s" "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"permissionDecision\":\"deny\",\"permissionDecisionReason\":\"BLOCKED by governance hook (issue #68). prompts/ is executor-owned and specs are immutable after handoff. Author PM specs in artifacts/specs/ instead; the executor copies the file into prompts/ and commits it. To revise a handed-off spec, create a NEW dated file in artifacts/specs/ - never edit one in place.\"}}";; esac; }
